---
title: "Speakers"
toc: false
---

## Organizing committee

::: {.people-grid}

::: {.person-card}
### Joel Zindel
<p class="role">Co-organizer</p>
<p class="affiliation">ETH Zürich · Institute of Molecular Health Sciences</p>
:::

::: {.person-card}
### Inge K. Herrmann
<p class="role">Co-organizer</p>
<p class="affiliation">ETH Zürich / Empa · Particles–Biology Interactions</p>
:::

::: {.person-card}
### Erin Greaves
<p class="role">Co-organizer</p>
<p class="affiliation">Warwick Medical School · Endometriosis</p>
:::

::: {.person-card}
### Sarah Herrick
<p class="role">Co-organizer</p>
<p class="affiliation">University of Manchester · MMT & Peritoneal Dialysis</p>
:::

:::

## Confirmed speakers

The full keynote line-up for 2027 is being assembled. The following speakers have confirmed their participation so far:

::: {.people-grid}

::: {.person-card}
<!-- ![](assets/speakers/judith-allen.jpg){.person-photo} -->
### Judith Allen
<p class="role">Confirmed speaker</p>
<p class="affiliation">University of Manchester</p>
:::

::: {.person-card}
<!-- ![](assets/speakers/samuel-carmichael.jpg){.person-photo} -->
### Samuel Carmichael II
<p class="role">Confirmed speaker</p>
<p class="affiliation">Wake Forest School of Medicine</p>
:::

::: {.person-card}
<!-- ![](assets/speakers/justin-deniset.jpg){.person-photo} -->
### Justin Deniset
<p class="role">Confirmed speaker</p>
<p class="affiliation">University of Calgary</p>
:::

::: {.person-card}
<!-- ![](assets/speakers/paul-kubes.jpg){.person-photo} -->
### Paul Kubes
<p class="role">Confirmed speaker</p>
<p class="affiliation">University of Calgary · Snyder Institute for Chronic Diseases</p>
:::

::: {.person-card}
<!-- ![](assets/speakers/honami-naora.jpg){.person-photo} -->
### Honami Naora
<p class="role">Confirmed speaker</p>
<p class="affiliation">MD Anderson Cancer Center · Department of Molecular Oncology</p>
:::

::: {.person-card}
<!-- ![](assets/speakers/gwendalyn-randolph.jpg){.person-photo} -->
### Gwendalyn J. Randolph
<p class="role">Confirmed speaker</p>
<p class="affiliation">Washington University in St. Louis</p>
:::

::: {.person-card}
<!-- ![](assets/speakers/carl-weidinger.jpg){.person-photo} -->
### Carl Weidinger
<p class="role">Confirmed speaker</p>
<p class="affiliation">Charité — Universitätsmedizin Berlin</p>
:::

:::

More speakers will be added as confirmations come in.

## Endorsements from the 1st Summit

> *"The programme looks very exciting!"* — Erin Greaves
>
> *"The peritoneal cancer and endometriosis session sounds amazing to me!"* — Nan Zhang
>
> *"While I study peritoneal macrophages, the impact of peritoneal cells could be so broad."* — Paul Kubes
